headline: Trump’s Promise of Lower Oil Prices Clashes With Industry Fears
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump and his officials tell Americans almost daily that the spike in fuel costs is a temporary blip that will reverse just as soon as he reaches a deal to end the war in Iran. headline: PBF Energy (PBF) May Report Negative Earnings: Know the Trend Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: PBF Energy (PBF) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) and Kinder Morgan Advance Western Gateway Pipeline Project
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) is one of the 10 Stocks to Buy on a Pullback. On April 20, 2026, Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) and Kinder Morgan announced progress on the Western Gateway Pipeline after a successful second open season secured sufficient long-term shipper commitments to advance the project, pending final agreements and board approvals. The proposed system […]

headline: Western Gateway Pipeline Reconfiguration Could Be A Game Changer For Phillips 66 (PSX)
summary: On 20 April 2026, Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan announced progress on the Western Gateway refined products pipeline, having secured long-term shipper commitments to advance a system linking Midwest and Gulf Coast refinery supply to Phoenix, California, and Las Vegas, with a targeted in-service date of mid-2029. A distinctive feature of this project is the planned reversal of both Kinder Morgan’s SFPP pipeline and Phillips 66’s Gold Pipeline, reconfiguring existing infrastructure to redirect...
